result:
Filled all 42 decisions for the patron-input block type commission. Output written to `/workspace/nexus-mk2/.scratch/patron-anima-eval/agent-output/patron-input-block-type-commission.yaml`.

Highlights:
- **1 custom answer** (D1): rejected the all-maps-vs-parallel-arrays frame — the principled shape is ordered question-array plus keyed answer-map.
- **1 abstain** (D14, low/no-principle-fired): field ordering inside an interface has no principle hook.
- **Confidence mix**: ~22 high, ~18 medium, 2 low.
- **Heavy principle activations**: #13 (live-writer precedent) across rigs/writ-status/rig-resume patterns; #2 (fail loud) on missing docs, terminal-state mutation, and validation; #23 (thinnest slice) on indexes, scope restrictions, and test structure; #7 (ergonomics) on CLI param shape; #22 (named reader) on the pending-default list and cli-only callability.
- **Refused option sets**: D1 was the clearest frame-rejection; a few others (D12 requiring rejectionReason, D26 throwing on unanswered) pushed back against the "lenient fallback" pattern the options nudged toward.
